name: Herbed Lentils & Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Burgundy or other dry red wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 3/4 cup cheese and remaining ingredients in a large bowl; stir well.
2. Pour mixture into an ungreased 2-quart casserole.
3. Cover and bake at 350°F for 2 hours, or until lentils are tender (stirring occasionally).
4. Uncover and sprinkle with remaining cheese.
5. Bake an additional 5 minutes, or until cheese melts.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
